from __future__ import annotations


def god_function_positive(raw: str, email: str) -> str:
    key, value = raw.split("=", 1)
    order = {key: value}
    if "id" not in order:
        raise ValueError("missing id")
    saved = f"saved:{order}"
    rendered = f"<div>{saved}</div>"
    sent = f"sent:{email}"
    return f"{rendered}:{sent}"
